subject: Move good CSD outputs from _02_preprocessing to _03_engineered
description: Content audit showed _02_preprocessing/nielsen/CSD/engineered/ has the correct 62-brand run; _03_engineered/nielsen/CSD/ has a corrupt empty run (0 rows). Copy 4 files to _03_engineered/nielsen/CSD/, overwriting corrupt copies, then delete _02 engineered/ subfolder.
